title: work-at Dashboard Quick Tunnel Surface
description: Fast task-surface health profile for worker-hosted dashboard quick-tunnel workflows.

checks.title: work-at target is reachable
checks.repairHint: Restore worker connectivity or re-register the target before attempting a worker quick tunnel.

checks.title: Registered dashboard repo path exists
checks.repairHint: Restore or re-register the dashboard repo path on the worker before attempting a quick tunnel.

checks.title: Bun is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install Bun on the worker before running the dashboard dev app.

checks.title: cloudflared is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install or expose `cloudflared` on the worker before attempting a quick tunnel. Do not fall back to localhost.run for this workflow.

checks.title: apps/dashboard-app exists on target
checks.repairHint: Use the correct worker repo surface containing `apps/dashboard-app` before starting a quick tunnel workflow.

checks.title: apps/dashboard-app/package.json exists on target
checks.repairHint: Restore the dashboard-app package or switch to the correct repo surface before starting the worker dev server.
